name: ecosystem-x
description: Ecosystem X: The Last Balance — a browser-based ecological investigation & restoration game. Scan a collapsing coastal wetland, reveal the hidden food web (a seeded DAG), diagnose the root stressor, and intervene to restore Ecosystem Health before the collapse timer expires. Vanilla JS + Canvas, zero build step, offline-capable. Tencent Cloud Hackathon 2026 · Track 1, Direction 2 (Biodiversity & Environmental Protection).
